data.text: VEGETATION ROUND THE TROPICS AND MIDLATITUDES SEEMS TO COME
MAINLY IN SHADES OF GREEN- TEAL, EMERALD, DEEP GREEN ETC.-AND
A SMATTERING OF OTHER COLOURS. HOPPER AND BIRD ACTIVITY IS
SOMEWHAT ABUNDANT...NOT TO CROWDED, BUT PLENTY OF HOPPERS
LURKING ABOUT WAITING TO AMBUSH SOME UNFORTUNATE STARDRIFTER..
...EXCUSE MY NONSCIENTIFIC BLABBER, ANYWAY, ABOUT UNDER HALF
LIQUID COVER, 0.94+ FG, TEPID TO POLAR TEMPERATURES.
0,19 MAY BE OF INTEREST TO SOME; TREES WITH TRANSLUCENT TRUNKS,
INCLUDING A PROMINENT ONE AT SPOT 30,5. RYAN GJK E6011.822.588
